case_title: K. MIRANDA VS. RONALD D. MCFADIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, K. PROP. MGR.-FRANCES HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT MCFADIN, RONALD D. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, K. PROP. MGR.-FRANCES HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT MCFADIN, RONALD D.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, K. PROP. MGR.-FRANCES HOTEL SERVED JUN-15-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCFADIN, RONALD D.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MCFADIN, RONALD D.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, K. PROP. MGR.-FRANCES HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCFADIN, RONALD D. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2084 MISSION STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, UNIT 207, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MCFADIN, RONALD D.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MCFADIN, RONALD D.
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-27-2026.
